title: lissochilus panduratus
intro: Lissochilus panduratus, also known as the Pandurated Lissochilus, is a species of orchid native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lissochilus panduratus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its herbal preparations have been used in traditional medicine for centuries.
